div.h2: Architecture Decision Record (ADR-M6): Hybrid Router Logic
div.p: To optimize the Coordinator Execution Plan, the engine must estimate selectivity $S$ via histogram:

ol.li: Heuristic Threshold: Switch to Pre-Filter if $S < 0.15 \times N$.
Dynamic Tuning: Adjust efSearch as $K / S$ to mitigate recall drop in post-filtering.

g.title: Full scan of metadata indices for predicate matches
Distance computations limited to IDs in Bitset
Traverse HNSW graph ignoring metadata initially

ul.li: Recall (R): Stochastic based on graph overlap.
